name: Indie Pogo: Retro CommanderVideo
description: This is the Retro CommanderVideo skin, which brings our heroic commander back to his origins. Harken back to earlier days of an era long past, complete with devamped sprites paddles, beats, and a chunky pixel eggplant plane!
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / Windows 8 / Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible graphics card with 2GB or more of video ram
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 150 MB available space
